results.rendered_html:
truṭiḥ, -ṭī f. [truṭ-im vā ṅīp]
1 Cutting, tearing.
2 A small part, an atom.
3 A very minute space of time equal to (1/4) of a Kṣaṇa or (1/2) of a Lava.
4 Doubt, uncertainty.
5 Loss, destruction.
6 Small cardamoms (the plant).
